conclusion: single-link quartic = -(a^4/384)|l_e|^4; Poisson average -> -(a^4/(384*15))(3S-2K): the Skyrme operator K emerges with coefficient +2a^4/(384*15) = +a^4/2880 per link; the cubic 3-axis sum sees only sum_i G_ii^2 (K-blind). Gauge-plaquette quartic is symmetric in F (commutator only inside |F|^2).
